title: DR.VIVA Smart Watches for Men, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, 1.3" Full Touch Screen Sleep Monitor 18 Sport Modes 7-Day Battery Life 5ATM Waterproof Watches for iPhone/Android Phones
features: 【Heart Rate Monitor & Sleep Monitor】Built-in PPG heart rate sensor coupled with HR algorithm, the smart watch can accurately monitor your heart rate during wearing. Automatic sleep tracking can monitor your sleep status (deep sleep, shallow sleep, awakening) and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis. All health tracking metrics can help you get a better understanding of your health and make reasonable adjustments to your lifestyle.

【Accurate Fitness Tracker & 18 Sport Modes】The activity tracker accurately record all-day activities like steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. The fitness tracker supports 18 sports modes: running, walking, climbing, cycling, basketball, football, tennis, aerobics, yoga, rope jumping, sit-ups, swimming, etc. Can give you more detailed insights into your whole day's activities and improve your athletic performance. Stay motivated all day!

【Long Battery Life & 5ATM Waterproof】The fitness tracker for men is equipped with a 170mAh Li-Polymer battery, only takes 2 hours to get fully charged by a magnetic charging cable to support 7 days of normal use. The fitness watch is 5ATM waterproof, you can wear it when washing hands, in the rain, or swimming in the shallow water, which allows you to swim in the pool with it without worries. (Note: Do Not support hot water shower, diving, surfing, saunas, spring, etc).

【1.3" Full Touch Screen & Custom Watch Face】Our smart watch with 1.3 inch IPS LCD color touch screen display, brings a resolution of 240x240. You can also customize the watch face in the "Zeroner" App to show your personality. DIY for your preferences and mood.

【Smart Notifications & More Practical Tools】The smartwatch is wide compatibility with iOS & Android. You can receive incoming calls or read SMS and SNS notifications on your smartwatch. (It CAN'T answer/reply to messages, calls, or text back.) (Including SMS, Facebook, Whatsapp, Twitter, Instagram, etc.). You will never miss important news. The smartwatches also feature remote control of music and camera, sedentary reminder, alarm clock, stopwatch, timer, a compass to meet your daily needs.

reviews.title: Keep track
reviews.text: This fitness tracker is simple to setup and in no time it'll be keeping track of your health so you have a monitor of what you do every day. It's simple to track and manage your sleep patterns or steps you take in a day. Very simple to use mobile app. The watch lasts a long time before dieing at least 2 days

reviews.title: Super impressed with this watch. Truly remarkable
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:ae47b9651b52b2c1b0485219f33680bf]] Wow. I am not impressed by much, but this watch is truly impressive for this price point.

Build: Very good build quality. The waterproof case feels solid, with responsive buttons and full color high res screen. Bracelet is soft rubber and is very comfortable. It's a very large band, so large or small wrists will fit in here.

Features: Though not perfect, the features on this watch are impressive. Measures steps, activities, heart rate, laps, sleep quality. Very very nice featuers. Plus it's waterproof!!!

Cons: Some of the interfaces are a bit clunky, and the app could use work, but it's fairly intuitive, and easy to use. I connected to my Galaxy S7 with no problems.

I recommend this watch!

reviews.title: My favorite budget smart watch
reviews.text:
I've tried a variety of budget smart watches, and this one by Dr.Viva has become my favorite. It's very comfortable, great flexible band, no issues with feeling like it's pressing into my wrist bones. The screen display is a good size without being too large, perfect for smaller wrists.

The Zeroner app has been fantastic, no problems. It accurately tracks my steps, sleep & oxygen. I like how it has a variety of exercises for me to document. The battery life is a big winner. I recharge the smart watch once a week, compared to twice a week with the other watches I've tried before. I was disappointed that I don't have the option to have my own picture as the screen display, but the app still has plenty of screens to choose from.

If you're like me and don't want to spend an exorbitant price on a smart watch, but would still like to enjoy the features of a smart watch this one would be a great option.

reviews.title: Inaccurate
reviews.text: This is a cute watch. Set up was simple. I liked the pink band and it was comfortable. The multi-lingual instructions are useless. Even worse it is inaccurate. I was at my desk and took it off. When I came back it said I logged 1800 steps.  It was sitting in the same place on the desk. Not. Back to my fit bit.

reviews.title: Very Durable and Love the Face
reviews.text:
The watch and band are more durable than I expected at this price point. The watch is very easy to install and should not take more than 5 minutes. For some reason I really like the aesthetics on the face of the watch.

I have another watch that is comparable and this watch costs 25% less. This is definitely good value. A watch like this is a game changer for people monitoring heart issues. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Sooooo cute, soooo comfy
reviews.text: I am very picky when it comes to things touching my skin. My socks have to be on the correct foot, tags on clothes need to die, I’d rather wear my clothes inside out than feel a seam pressing into my skin. This band is exactly what I was looking for, barely there. It smells like real leather so I guess they weren’t lying about that. The color was labeled as blue but the picture looked greenish bluish grayish. In person it looks just like their picture and I’m happy about that. I’m petite and overweight (5’4 and 175lbs) and this size is perfect, plenty of room to go bigger or smaller. I adore the thinness of the band, no more bulky Fitbit!

reviews.title: Angry customer
reviews.text: So after receiving these items on March 29, 2021, it took 5 hrs to charge, the headphone jack doesn't even fit the watch!  On top of that my daughter plays on it for 15 mins and it dies!  She wore it to play on it and the wrist band broke!  I'm not happy at all and will never be buying this brand ever again!  It wouldn't even turn on right away after charging! The headphones are absolutely the worst thing ever ! I plugged them in to my phone and all we heard was high pitched screeching!  I'm not asking for my money back, I'm just warning others to be careful!  Complete false advertising!

Yesterday I was told by my 7 year old great grand... that My giftto her was the best gift!!!! Said she plays with it for hours at a time!!!
What could make me happier?????.. 😂

title: iTOUCH Explorer 3 Smartwatch (with Heart Rate Tracking, Step Counter, Notifications)
features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. Control your phone’s music without taking it out of your pocket with Music Remote. Set reminders to drink more water, wash hands, even get up and move around when you’ve been sitting too long. Open our mobile app to track female health, log meals, water intake, weight changes and caffeine consumption.

RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! MOBILE PHONE COMPATIBILITY: Connect your Explorer 3 to any Android or iPhone using the iTouch Wearables app*. (*requires iOS 13 or higher and Android 9 or higher)

reviews.title: Great quality!

reviews.title: Good value & replacement for worn bands
reviews.text: Happy this product was available for my Garmin watch. The protective layer on the original band was wearing out and caused me to have a skin rask from the silicone. Switching to the NotoCity bands helped that rash on my wrist heal and go away.

reviews.title: Replacement - extends the life of the watch
reviews.text: One of my watch staps is original, the other stap with the clasp seems to have a 1 year life span. This is my second replacement and so far so good. The rose gold color is a good match. My watch is 3 years old and i regularly swim and take it in the ocean because 3 years in, what's the worst that can happen. This strap definitely extends the life of my watch.

reviews.title: Awesome!!

reviews.title: So easy to install!

title: EURANS Smart Watch 42mm Bluetooth Calling (Answer/Make Call) HD Touch Screen IP68 Waterproof Fitness Tracker for Android and iOS Phones, Blood Oxygen & Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Tracking for Men Women

𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞: 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐀𝐏𝐏.

【𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 & 𝐒𝐥𝐞𝐞𝐩 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠】Features blood oxygen & heart rate monitor, this fitness tracker can track your heart rate all day and alert you once your heart rate reach safe threshold. It can track your sleep peroid: Light, Deep and REM sleep stage. If you'd like to know your blood oxygen level, just a press on the watch and it will start to mearsure.

【𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥𝐲 𝐅𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐅𝐢𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬】Up to 100 sports modes, this watch will meet all your need on exercise! After connected to your phone, it can also record your ourdoor route and display in App. Features weather forecast can let you know how the weathe going and plan your exercise!

【𝐆𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲 𝐋𝐢𝐟𝐞 & 𝐁𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝟓.𝟑】290mAh battery provides up to 8 days using or 30 days standby. Equips with bluetooth 5.3, compatible with Android 9.0 and iOS 11.0 or above, you can experience faster, wider and low delay connection.

reviews.title: Easy set up and can text and phone calls
reviews.text: I like the looks and it tells me to get off my ass and move.

reviews.title: Decently priced
reviews.text: Chose this watch because of the simplicity and overall look.  The step counts and sleep features work very well.  Battery life is approximately 2 days use when using the push button feature.  If you enable the sensor to come on with your wrist approximately 1 day use.  Charge works very well and quickly.  The downfall is definitely the rubber banding.  The piece that holds the excess band tends to move.  Call feature is ok for the price and messaging is ok.  I primarily needed for an alarm, clock and date.

reviews.title: great smartwatch
reviews.text: I bought this for my uncle for his birthday. He wanted a smart watch to monitor his health. He liked it and it was easy for him to set up.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I had an Apple Watch before this. This is really no different than the Apple Watch,  everything that worked on there works fine here! Did find a screen protector  it is (Smaat 1.7”) it fits perfect! And touch screen still works fine. as far as I can tell there are no other bands made for this type of connection, which is kind of ridiculous. So if the band breaks, you literally have to buy a new watch don’t like that! Also, wish it could at least have the temperature on the screen! And there are only certain screens that have the power level or day and date, and you cannot pick a screen from your photos, etc. and add the date. Just trying to inform people of all of the things that I was looking for in reviews and no one ever mentioned any of these hopefully it helps!

reviews.title: Nice watch!
reviews.text: I bought this watch to track my fitness mainly.  I'm not the type of person who's into gadgets per se but I think this is a winner.  It's not expensive but still stylish and functional.

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch3 2020 Smartwatch (Bluetooth + Wi-Fi + GPS) International Model (Bronze, 41mm)
description: The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps. Larger screen, but lighter and thinner for more comfort: With its subtle rotating bezel, it's easier to see and focus on what's important on an even larger screen. The Galaxy Watch3 is thinner and smaller, and up to 15% lighter with a sophisticated look that, thanks to its reduced frame, is perfect for the wrist. Breathe easier with built-in oxygen measurement: The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood. Because oxygen saturation is directly related to physical activity, you can use the Galaxy Watch3 to push your routine to the next level. Enjoy a better sleep: The Galaxy Watch3 records your active sleep, deep sleep, and total sleep time to keep track and improve the quality of your sleep. Samsung partnered with the National Sleep Foundation to include educational content and provide tips on your device to help you sleep better. Do your best and then repeat it: With over 120 home workout programs to choose from, the Galaxy Watch3 helps you move your body at your own pace. Pick one from your phone and stream it on your TV. It will show you your heart rate in real-time while you exercise. Use the Ridge Sport strap for even more accurate stats. Continue your conversations: When you receive a new message, the Galaxy Watch3 shows your conversation history so you can follow them. You can also view images without needing an extra touch, making it easier to keep up while you're working out. Add some context with the smart answer: Respond to messages at all times and without missing a beat. The Galaxy Watch3's smart reply analyzes the texts and photos you receive and gives you possible answers in different categories, such as food, celebrations, selfies and much more.
features: 1.2 "(30.2mm) Super AMOLED, 360 x 360px Resolution, 16M Colors, CPU: Dual-Core 1.15GHz, 340mAh Battery, Tizen OS, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi
The Galaxy Watch3 uses red LEDs and infrared rays to calculate your SpO2 levels or the amount of oxygen in your blood.
Sensors: Accelerometer, Barometer, Gyro Sensor, Light Sensor, Optical Heart Rate Sensor. The only smartwatch with a precise rotating bezel for navigating between apps
5 ATM/IP68 The water and dust resistance rating, Military-grade durability, Larger screen but lighter and thinner for more comfort.
International Model No Warranty in the US. Compatible with Android and iOS devices. Samsung Pay - Not Supported.

reviews.title: So comfortable!
reviews.text: Best band I’ve ever worn! These are so comfortable and lightweight that I sometimes forgot I have my Fitbit on! It’s breathable! I like that it was so many holes that you can use to tighten with. Sometimes with others their so far apart that it’s righter too loose or too tight. Trust me, you will not have that issue with this band! The design is so beautiful and the colors are perfect!

reviews.title: Great bands
reviews.text: Comfortable and lots of holes to change size. Looks pretty and I like the thinner band.

reviews.title: Easier to set-up than previous bands
reviews.text:
I have really struggled getting replacement bands in place in the past. I had this one switched over in a matter of minutes. The lacy look makes it less apparent that the band is vinyl and the dark colors help to hide stains. I have bad metal allergies nd was a bit afraid of what would happen with the clasp given it is metal and has some contact with my skin. Been wearing this since December and the only time I have issues with a rash was when I had the watch fastened too tightly to my wrist. I believe this was from trapped sweat and moisture and not a metal allergy reaction.
Extra great deal in that you get three bands. I don't foresee a need to buy more bands for at least a year.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text: Cute style; nice colors; comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Comfortable and affordable
reviews.text:
I really like the pink bandThe material is cool and comfortable. It is easy to change the bands for a different look.
I would definitely buy again.

title: Garmin Forerunner® 955 Solar, GPS Running Smartwatch with Solar Charging Capabilities, Tailored to Triathletes, Long-Lasting Battery, Whitestone
description: Lead the pack with Forerunner® 955 Solar, the premium GPS running and triathlon smartwatch with Power Glass™ solar charging to extend battery life. The training readiness feature tells you when you’re primed for a productive session — while daily suggested workouts adapt to your performance and recovery alongside the race widget, which provides training tips, course details and completion time predictions. With morning report, you can get an overview of your sleep, recovery, training and more — as well as a picture of your overall health with heart rate variability (HRV) status (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics). On the run, new multi-band GPS and full-color, built-in maps help you navigate confidently. And with traditional buttons and a touch display, it has never been easier to tap into your training status and know whether you’re training productively, peaking or strained. If you’re pushing toward the podium — or to the very limits — Forerunner 955 Solar is by your side with up to 20 days of battery life with solar charging in smartwatch mode (assuming all-day wear with 3 hours per day outside in 50,000 lux conditions).
features: Built with an always-on, full-color display that’s light on the wrist and easy to read even in direct sunlight

Battery life: up to 20 days of battery life in smartwatch mode for a full picture of your health — from sleep to training (assuming all-day wear with 3 hours per day outside in 50,000 lux conditions); up to 42 hours in GPS mode and up to 49 hours with solar charging (assuming continuous use for entire period in 50,000 lux conditions); up to 110 hours in UltraTrac mode with solar charging (assuming use in 50,000 lux conditions)
Click or swipe through maps and stats with traditional button controls or a new, responsive touchscreen
Whether you’re running on city streets or riding densely covered trails, Forerunner 955 provides full-color, built-in mapping to keep you on track

Access multiple global navigation satellite systems, and get access to multiple frequencies sent by navigation satellites for improved accuracy in areas where GNSS signals are reflected, weak or typically don't penetrate — giving you superior accuracy for how far and how fast you’ve run — even in challenging environments
From the moment you wake up, get a training readiness score based on your sleep quality, recovery, training and more, so you can determine whether it’s a good day to go hard — or take it easy
Get ready for your next race with race widget — which provides training tips, personalized daily suggested workouts and completion time predictions based on course details, weather and performance

Using new indicators such as HRV status, your recent exercise history and performance, get an easy insight into your overall effort with training status — and know whether you’re training productively, peaking or strained

Receive an overview of your sleep, recovery and training outlook as soon as you wake up with morning report — alongside HRV status, training readiness and weather; you can even customize your report to show what you want to see (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics)

With HRV status, gain a deeper understanding of your overall health, recovery and training performance through heart rate variability while you sleep, based on technology developed by our Firstbeat Analytics team (This device is intended to give an estimate of your activity and metrics)

reviews.title: A great watch for a runner
reviews.text: Haven't found anything I don't like about this watch.  Have begun following it's training advice, and it appears to be working.  Provides a wealth of interesting information.  One real plus for us old guys: the face is larger than the 735XT making it easier for these old eyes to read it.

reviews.title: Buena compra
reviews.text: Llego excelente, bien empacado

reviews.title: Resumen de datos y métricas de seguimiento
reviews.text: Verdaderamente útil, el seguimiento de sueño, entreno, potencia, y muchos mas datos que nos permiten dar un seguimiento más preciso del estado físico.

reviews.title: VO2 and race prediction are garbage
reviews.text:
For some reason with the 955 - Garmin decided to stop updating VO2 and race prediction - so if you have come to rely/look at that - don't get this watch. They have tried fixing it with the last few beta updates, but they can't seem to figure out how to correct it.

Multi-band GPS is nice - which honestly is the only reason we all haven't moved back to the 945/735 - which are AMAZING watches.

reviews.title: Fantastic update
reviews.text:
The 955 is a fantastic update over the previous 9XX, 7XX, and 6XX models. This update I'd much more communicative and provides loads more encouraging updates and workout suggestions. The interface is also more fluid than previous models. The return of touch to the user interface is nice but, optional.

Definitely worth going with

That product is inspected and tested to work and look like new by Amazon-qualified suppliers. Then, the product is sold as an Amazon Renewed product on Amazon. If not satisfied with the purchase, renewed products are eligible for replacement or refund under the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.

reviews.title: Like it was made by Fitbit!
reviews.text:
I love this strap it is so pretty and such a value for the money. It looks like it cost way more. The little kit it came with to attach it to the Fitbit and to remove extra links was so handy and easy to use. It attached with no trouble at all.

The only issue I had with it was that the rose gold color is slightly off from the Fitbit, but when wearing it, it’s not next to it directly so you can’t really tell. It’s not enough to bother me or take a star off but it could be for some.

reviews.title: Surprised at the comfort and beauty of the band.
reviews.text:
I've only had it on for a few hours, but I love it. The colors, black, pink on the resin look so rich and shiny. And it's a comfortable fit. I did have to take out 2 tabs to get a snug fit. Taking out the tabs wasn't difficult after figuring out the way the tool that came with it. Can't say the instructions were the best, but I figured it out.
I always got the magnetic mesh band in rose gold, but it always discolored and no matter what i tried I couldn't get it cleaned.
This is why I tried a new band. A review prompt gave suggestions of different things to comment on. One of the suggestions was a mobile app. I have no idea what that had to do with the band. Maybe someone knows and can let me know.
UPDATE:
I've been wearing it 24 hours a day, except when showering or recharging the watch. NO discloration, no running of colors (bracelet) and it doesn't get dirty looking like the metalic bands. I'm going to buy another one, just in case something happens to this. So worth the money.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: Kept breaking out to the old bands never had a problem with this one!

reviews.title: Love it!!
reviews.text: Love the colors on the band. I like the way the band closes.

reviews.title: Strong Enough For Every Day Use
reviews.text: This is my 2nd band and I love them! I wear them every day and they hold up fantastically! I highly recommend trying them and I will definitely be buying more colors in the future.

Plus drinking water reminders, sedentary reminders and different reminders as set in alarms.

Heart Rate & Blood Oxygen Monitor: The health watch performs 24/7 high-precision monitoring of your heart rate. Plus measure your blood oxygen saturation (SpO2) level within seconds, let you understand how your body feels and prioprity your training endurance.

Fitness Tracker Watch & Sleep Tracking: Focus on your workout and exercise with built-in 14 sport modes, the fitness watch records your steps, distance, heart rate changes, calories burned, active minutes and more. Record your night sleep patterns such as deep sleep, light sleep, REM and creat intuitive charts. You can understand and improve your lifestyle for better health.

Fast Charging & Wide Compatibility: Say goodbye to daily recharge, 20 minutes charging offers one day wearing, 2 hours fully charging offers you one week worry-free wearing. Compatible for Android 6.0+ or iOS 10.0+. Connected with Deeprio app, you can check weather, play music, find your phone and get more that make you living a easier life.

reviews.title: Nice watch
reviews.text:
I’ve got a few Deeprio watches now. They’re really nice a good value for the money compared to an Apple Watch!

I like the styling they have and the finish is always really nice.

You turn this on, pick language and pair with your phone. the app takes over from there and gives you access to all the cool features like heart rate monitoring and fitness tracking.

reviews.title: WORKS GREAT & EASY TO USE
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:cc0b7e541be31c4c16b260b7d8ef969b]] I am giving this to my grand daughter, since joing the military she has started to really like running. This smart watch monitors your health in all kinds of different sports modes. I like how soft and flexible the band is. It is well made. It has a long battery life. It has mobile apps.

reviews.title: Smart
reviews.text: I bought this watch as a gift for my sister, she was very happy, it has a high-definition LED screen that is touchscreen. The price is very affordable and it looks great. She can tell  the time, can record heart rate and fitness records and count her steps. You can also watch the weather, play music, and has a lot of features that feels just like a cell phone, which is a great experience. My sister loves it.

reviews.title: Easy to use. Easy to link
reviews.text: Love the watch. Still learning things but I didn't read the manual lol. But super easy to figure out!!!
